en: Hey kids, if this wasn't a commercial, this was real life, and I came up to you in a teen club, would you dance with me?
ko: 얘들아, 이게 광고가 아니라 현실이고 내가 청소년 클럽에서 다가오면, 나랑 춤출래?

en: Stacy. Stacy, would you dance with me?
Hugo, what do you say, bra bra, you dancing?
Miranda, if this wasn't a commercial, this was real life, we're in a teen dance club.
ko: 미란다, 이게 광고가 아니라 현실이고, 우리가 청소년 댄스 클럽에 있다면.

en: Miranda, would you dance with me?
Either he goes or you're both fired.
ko: 그 사람 내보내든지 둘 다 해고야.
